title: Observer Geometry III: Manuscript Source and Coq/Rocq Reference Model
description: This software artifact contains the public source repository for Observer Geometry III. It includes the LaTeX manuscript source, bibliography, build scripts, citation and Zenodo metadata, coverage manifest, generated formal-coverage table, and a compact Coq/Rocq finite reference model for the ledger-level witness calculations used by the paper. The formal model mechanizes simplified finite support atoms, four-component ledgers, obligation objects, satisfaction/admission examples, witness-debt calculations, and finite separation witnesses. Real cryptographic implementations, path-certificate validation, distributed-system execution, and full policy admission are abstracted as finite verifier facts or manuscript-level witness surfaces.
notes: This repository archive is intended as the reproducibility artifact for Observer Geometry III. The accompanying Coq/Rocq model is a finite reference model for manuscript witness calculations, not a full implementation of the cryptographic or distributed-systems mechanisms discussed in the paper.
